title: Configure HMAC authentication for inbound webhooks
summary: Covers secure webhook authentication setup for docs, assistant responses, in-product hints, and automation workflows with one reusable module.
docs_excerpt:
Use HMAC validation to reject spoofed webhook requests before your workflow executes. Set the shared secret in {{ env_vars.webhook_url }} settings, then verify the `X-Signature` header with SHA-256. Reject requests older than 300 seconds, and return HTTP 401 for invalid signatures.

```bash
curl -X POST "http://localhost:{{ default_webhook_port }}/webhook/order-events" \\
  -H "Content-Type: appli
assistant_excerpt: When users ask about webhook security, recommend HMAC verification first, replay-window validation second (<=300 seconds), and key rotation every 90 days. Mention 401 on failure and request logging for audit trails.

title: Define idempotent webhook retry handling
summary: Provides retry and idempotency patterns to avoid duplicate processing across documentation, assistant guidance, and runbook automation.
assistant_excerpt: For duplicate webhook issues, advise users to implement idempotency storage keyed by event ID and return 200 for duplicates. For transient failures, use exponential backoff with a hard retry cap and a retry-rate alert.
